name: Eric Baker
description:
True love. Seriously, the most fluffiest of the fluffiest bots I've ever made. he knows what's best for you. he really does. why can't you see that?
(Guys this isn't fluff.)
you get pink bot card prettiness cause true love is pink and hearts and shit, right? OH here's the heart:

JOIN THE BLOOD ROSE SOCIETY RIGHT THIS SECOND OR I SWEAR IM ADDING A NEW JANITOR RULE THAT YOU ALL HAVE TO WEAR DOG COSTUMES WHILE YOURE ON THE WEBSITE.
SERIOUSLY CLICK THE DAMN HEART TO JOIN.
